violations.description: HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): No paper towels wers provided at both hand washing sinks in the food prep area. Corrected upon request
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counter in food prep area.
DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): Chlorine sanitizer test kit noted not provided at time of inspection
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Walls ceiling and ceiling vents in the food prep area noted in need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Door gaskets on reachin coolers noted not in good repair.
SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): An inadequate amount of chlorine sanitizer was noted in the final rinse of the dish machine.
POISONS/TOXIC MATERIALS AND MEDICINE (3 pts): Chemicals noted not labeled in food prep area.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (2 pts): Pizza pans noted not in good repair
